name: ariadne-vscode
description: Chats are disposable, tasks are permanent. Persists task state (goals, decisions, files, todos, errors, commands) across any AI assistant.

chatParticipants.name: ariadne
chatParticipants.description: Recall and update the current task's persistent state (goal, decisions, todos, errors, files).

commands.name: resume
commands.description: Reload full context for the current task

commands.name: task
commands.description: Create, list (add --all-workspaces for every workspace), switch, pause, complete, archive, or reopen tasks (pause/done/archive/reopen with an id work across workspaces)

commands.name: question
commands.description: Add, list, or resolve open questions

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search this workspace's tasks, checkpoints, decisions, todos, errors, and more (add --all-workspaces to search every workspace)

ariadne.passiveCapture.enabled.description: Automatically record saved files, terminal commands, and git commits against the current task in the background. Requires a window reload to take effect after changing.

scripts.package:linux-x64: mkdir -p dist-vsix && node esbuild.js --vsce-target=linux-x64 && vsce package --no-dependencies --target linux-x64 -o dist-vsix/ariadne-linux-x64.vsix
scripts.package:linux-arm64: mkdir -p dist-vsix && node esbuild.js --vsce-target=linux-arm64 && vsce package --no-dependencies --target linux-arm64 -o dist-vsix/ariadne-linux-arm64.vsix
scripts.package:darwin-x64: mkdir -p dist-vsix && node esbuild.js --vsce-target=darwin-x64 && vsce package --no-dependencies --target darwin-x64 -o dist-vsix/ariadne-darwin-x64.vsix
scripts.package:darwin-arm64: mkdir -p dist-vsix && node esbuild.js --vsce-target=darwin-arm64 && vsce package --no-dependencies --target darwin-arm64 -o dist-vsix/ariadne-darwin-arm64.vsix
scripts.package:win32-x64: mkdir -p dist-vsix && node esbuild.js --vsce-target=win32-x64 && vsce package --no-dependencies --target win32-x64 -o dist-vsix/ariadne-win32-x64.vsix
scripts.package:all: pnpm run package:linux-x64 && pnpm run package:linux-arm64 && pnpm run package:darwin-x64 && pnpm run package:darwin-arm64 && pnpm run package:win32-x64
